creator: petef@databits.net
text:
- update to version 2.4.0
- take over as maintainer from ports@
- sort USE_*; add gnome support hooks
- make plist more dynamic
- update & sort MAN1
- install pixmaps into ${PREFIX}/share/fvwm2/pixmaps instead of 
  ${PREFIX}/lib/X11/fvwm2/pixmaps
- adjust patch (modules/* moved to extras/*)

On another note, x11-wm/fvwm2-beta can be axed (2.4.0 is the latest stable
release, and there are no development releases).

Fix: (http://hex.databits.net/~petef/diffs/fvwm2.diff)
